name: rest-apis
description: Skills for designing, auditing, and evolving RESTful APIs following an adapted version of the Zalando REST API Guidelines (URL-based versioning, /api base path).

plugins.name: rest-api-design
plugins.description: Design, audit, and extend RESTful APIs: named operations (/audit, /add-collection, /add-resource, /new-version) plus knowledge skills covering naming, URLs, JSON, HTTP methods, pagination, errors, compatibility, security, and headers.
